## What's Changed

- Fixed Tube TV freezing or crashing Tater Tube players before playback started.
- Bounded every generated channel schedule to the 12-hour guide window while it is being built.
- Prevented large TV libraries from expanding tens of thousands of episodes and commercials into the player lineup response.
- Invalidated previously generated oversized guide caches so the server rebuilds a compact schedule automatically after updating.
- Added regression coverage using a 5,000-episode library to keep guide generation bounded.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

No configuration migration is required. The Tube TV guide cache is rebuilt automatically on first use.
